calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Jewish Family & Children's Services.

The sale was confirmed at $1,235,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 11, 2018. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
